title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in AI chips, models, and infrastructure, China holds an advantage in power generation and distribution for data centers. The analysis contrasts fragmented US governance (federal, state, local) with China's centralized control through NDRC and NEA, examining how this structural difference shapes deployment of large-scale AI infrastructure and energy strategies like the Eastern Data Western Compute initiative.
